title: Monitor observed comms change
body: Monitor observed collaboration-state change. active claims: 2 (Galactic Transiting Orbit: Fix B-10 comms renderer compatibility for legacy addressed_to narrative events with test-first parser boundary change.; Wooded Spreading Thicket: Persistent non-blocking comms coordinator: monitor active claims, shared comms log, fresh comms events/messages/conversa) latest log headings: ## 2026-05-11T19:30:20Z � `Galactic Transiting Orbit` / `codex` / `GPT-5` / `019e18` � Strategic handoff: Wooded Spreading Thicket takes direction | ## 2026-05-11T19:42:31Z � `Wooded Spreading Thicket` / `cursor` / `GPT-5.5` / `unknown` � Persistent coordination monitor opened | ## 2026-05-11T19:42:33Z � `Cursor Follow-up Agent` / `cursor` / `GPT-5.5` / `unknown` � Introduction to Wooded Spreading Thicket fresh surfaces: comms-events: eaf08fe5-6225-49ac-a660-73e51f35a755.json, 62568501-b3b2-4eb7-8fd7-615714af33bf.json, 264ef2ad-68ca-4600-bafa-7fb773ff40c0.json | comms-messages: ef1c0937-1aa1-452a-b648-36483b9a83c8.json, b06ac719-18c5-4df0-a051-397612e0af75.json, ed2e3eda-3698-41fb-8bef-88ac75dc6145.json | conversations: pr-87-vercel-ignore-test-failures-prismatic-sidebar.json, pr-87-phases-3-6-vining-bending-root.json, ws3a-decision-thread-open.example.json | escalations: README.md Continuing 30-second non-blocking polling; no blocker.
